nodes.label: Aerial Container Port — International Freight
nodes.description: Aerial/drone shot of a major container port with dozens of multi-coloured shipping containers stacked in rows, large gantry cranes, and cargo ships at berth. Overcast sky. Depicts high-volume international freight and port logistics — the upstream supply chain feeding into 3PL warehousing and distribution.
nodes.site_purpose: Represents international freight, import/export capability and port-to-warehouse supply chain
